name: metal lined tunnel
description: I'm in a metal lined tunnel
hints: A tunnel connecting two important areas. NORTH leads to the red rooms, SOUTH to hydroponics.
Go NORTH to reach the red metal room with a control console, or SOUTH to the hydroponics/display case area.
notes: Tunnel connecting the red metal room area (room 12, north) with the hydroponics room (room 8, south).
